allowed_wording: Baseline-AR was checked on the same six QMSum residual-risk target rows with the same targeted policy.
The result is deterministic proxy evidence only and is suitable for claim-boundary triage.
blocked_wording: Baseline-AR mini-check completes the full matrix.
Residual QMSum risk is conclusively caused by one factor.
claim_impact: Use this as scoped evidence about whether residual QMSum risk is consistent with target-model/QMSum grounding limits or compression-path-specific risk. Do not claim QMSum semantic correctness.
meaning: Residual QMSum failures are consistent with local target-model evidence locating / grounding limitations and/or QMSum source-reference/proxy limitations, not only CC-DFlash compression.
